prompt: Explain how git-crypt interacts with worktrees in this repo. List the exact commands for creating a worktree, initializing git-crypt in it, and rebasing a worktree onto main. Cite file:line references.
What file-length limits does this repo enforce, where are they checked (hooks vs CI), and how does the pre-commit hook report violations? Reference the actual scripts.
Identify anti-patterns to watch for when reviewing implementation plans in this repo. Cite docs/internal retros or plan-review artifacts.
